title: Compose two query functions via pipe
prompt: Define two query builders: `MyApp.Accounts.active_users/1` which filters `active: true`, and `MyApp.Accounts.by_team/2` which filters by `team_id`. Both take and return an `Ecto.Queryable`. Write a caller `MyApp.Accounts.active_in_team/1` that composes them via pipe. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Canonical composable-builder pattern; single file, one level of composition.
